hero_subtitle: SFTY provides leadership teams with a unified operational view that consolidates compliance workflows, audit-ready evidence, and regulatory reporting into one scalable control layer.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades without unified reporting
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to maintain clear visibility across dispersed compliance and risk data. This fragmentation slows regulatory reporting, weakens audit readiness and limits timely operational decision-making for banks managing digital asset compliance.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates dispersed compliance and risk data into a centralized control layer that tracks reporting workflows, audit evidence and decision history to support timely executive oversight and regulatory readiness.
workflow_title: From case creation to reporting package
workflow_description: SFTY organizes alerts and provider checks into structured cases with evidence that support audit-ready reports for internal and regulatory review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented reports. One enterprise view
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a unified compliance layer that connects risk signals, decisions, cases and evidence into audit-ready reports for clearer oversight and control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY delivers banks a governed compliance layer for integrated provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and scalable deployment supporting clearer risk and reporting visibility.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive reporting and risk control
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY structures audit-ready compliance reports
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how compliance workflows deliver traceable decision logs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY enhances risk visibility for bank leadership
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for bank executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides bank executives with a connected compliance control layer, delivering clear visibility across workflows, risk, audits and reporting workflows for informed decision-making and operational risk reduction.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support executive reporting?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures regulatory, case and risk data into tailored reporting workflows, enabling executives and management to review consolidated compliance insights and prepare management, banking and regulator reports efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and provider outputs as audit-ready evidence, supporting traceability, review readiness and defensible reporting for regulatory, bank due diligence and internal audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance systems?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects to existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, consolidating their outputs into an integrated control layer without requiring replacement or disruption of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting and structuring their outputs into workflows, decisions, evidence and reports rather than replacing underlying compliance or analytics tools.
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports audit-ready evidence, regulatory alignment and executive control across compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
